entities.name: NEEM
entities.description: Azadirachta indica L., the source plant for the seed extract

entities.name: ALCOHOL EXTRACT OF NEEM SEED
entities.description: An extractive rich in lipid associates derived from neem seeds using ethanol

entities.name: NITRIFICATION
entities.description: The biological process of converting ammonium to nitrate

entities.name: NITRIFICATION INHIBITOR
entities.description: A substance that slows down the process of nitrification

entities.name: ETHANOL SOLVENT
entities.description: The solvent used to extract components from neem seeds

entities.name: LIPID ASSOCIATES
entities.description: Components rich in lipids found within the neem seed extract

entities.name: SOIL
entities.description: The medium in which the extract and NH4-N were incubated

entities.name: NH4-N
entities.description: Ammonium nitrogen used as a substrate in the study

entities.name: AMMONIUM SULPHATE
entities.description: A chemical compound used to supply NH4-N

entities.name: UREA
entities.description: A chemical compound used to supply NH4-N

entities.name: INCUBATION
entities.description: The process of maintaining the soil mixture under specific conditions over time to observe nitrification inhibition
